headline: Will Google Launch Agentic Travel Bookings At I/O 2026? Booking And This Travel Company Are Poised To Benefit
summary: Google will host its I/O event on May 19-20 and may launch agentic travel bookings through partnerships rather than cutting out OTAs.

raw.headline: Will Google Launch Agentic Travel Bookings At I/O 2026? Booking And This Travel Company Are Poised To Benefit

headline: Agoda Simplifies Trip Planning with Multi-Product Booking in One Checkout
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda has introduced a new multi-product booking engine that allows travelers to book hotels, flights, and activities in a single seamless, transaction.

raw.headline: Agoda Simplifies Trip Planning with Multi-Product Booking in One Checkout
raw.summary: Digital travel platform Agoda has introduced a new multi-product booking engine that allows travelers to book hotels, flights, and activities in a single seamless, transaction.

headline: Agoda Reveals Indonesia Leads Asia as Top Family Travelers
summary: With summer and school breaks fast approaching, many families are making plans to enjoy the perfect season for family getaways. Digital travel platform Agoda reveals that family travel remains the most popular choice for Asian travelers, ranking higher in preference than travel with a spouse or partner, or even with friends. Regionally, Indonesians lead the ranks with 69% of survey respondents selecting family travel as the top choice, higher than the Asia-wide average of 52%. They are followed
